scripts.check: pnpm run check:ui && pnpm run check:python && pnpm run check:scripts
scripts.check:python: node scripts/run-python.mjs scripts/check-python-syntax.py packages/cli scripts tests/contract
scripts.format: pnpm run format:ui && pnpm exec prettier --write .github/workflows package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml eslint.config.mjs prettier.config.mjs scripts/*.mjs
scripts.format:check: pnpm exec prettier --check .github/workflows package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml eslint.config.mjs prettier.config.mjs scripts/*.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm run check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run test:contract
scripts.generate: pnpm run generate-info && pnpm run generate-share-file
